zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles de Erdington於1320年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Henry De Erdington46歲，母親Joan de Wolvey40歲。他於1339年與Elizabeth de Tolethorpe在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年11月13日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾巴羅 武朋 素亞享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Giles de Erdington于1320年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Henry De Erdington46岁，母亲Joan de Wolvey40岁。他于1339年与Elizabeth de Tolethorpe在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年11月13日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾巴羅 武朋 素亞享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erdington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Reddington
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Rettendon (Essex), from an uncertain first element + Old English dūn ‘hill’.
Irish (Mayo): from an Anglicized form of Ó Roideacháin or Ó Rodacháin; see Roddy 2.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles de Erdington was born in 1320, in Warwickshire, England, his father, Henry De Erdington, was 46 and his mother, Joan de Wolvey, was 40. He married Elizabeth de Tolethorpe in 1339, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 13 November 1359, in Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Giles d’Erdington est né en 1320, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Erdington, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wolvey, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Tolethorpe en 1339, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1359, à Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

Er hat 1339 in Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth de Tolethorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles de Erdington è nato il nel 1320 nel Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Henry De Erdington, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Wolvey, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Tolethorpe nel 1339, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 novembre 1359, nel Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.Barrow upon Soar, Leicestershire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 배로 업 소르
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles de Erdington(이)가 1320년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Erdington(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Wolvey(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 링코실르에서 Elizabeth de Tolethorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 배로 업 소르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Giles de Erdington родился в 1320 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry De Erdington было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wolvey, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Tolethorpe в 1339 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 ноября 1359 г. в местности барроу упон соар, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
